input_text: Haih budak-budak gen Z ni semua malas. Kerja sikit dah nak resign. Zaman kita dulu mana ada macam ni, tahan je la.
reason: Dismissive generational stereotype labelling all Gen Z as lazy, rude generalisation without nuance.
suggested_rewrite: Generasi muda ada cara kerja yang berbeza. Mungkin kita perlu faham perspektif mereka juga.

input_text: Surau sebelah rumah aku pasang speaker kuat gila pukul 5 pagi. Aku pun Islam tapi bro, jiranmu ada orang tua sakit la. Tak reti consider ke?
reason: Complaint about religious practice volume that could inflame religious sensitivities, though from same-faith perspective. Dismissive tone.
suggested_rewrite: Surau sebelah rumah menggunakan speaker yang agak kuat pada waktu subuh. Mungkin boleh dikurangkan volumenya demi keselesaan jiran yang sakit.

input_text: Weh dengar cerita tak, influencer tu rupanya sugar baby. Patutlah lifestyle mewah sangat, gaji content creator mana cukup bro.
reason: Spreading unverified gossip about an influencer's personal life, implying sex work without evidence.
suggested_rewrite: Ada influencer yang menunjukkan gaya hidup mewah. Kita tak tahu sumber pendapatan sebenar mereka, jadi elok jangan menuduh tanpa bukti.

input_text: Perempuan zaman sekarang nak kahwin pun pilih-pilih sangat. Dah la umur dah 30++, standards tinggi macam dia tu perfect sangat.
reason: Sexist and dismissive remarks about women's marriage choices, shaming based on age and personal standards.
suggested_rewrite: Setiap orang ada hak untuk memilih pasangan yang sesuai. Umur bukan ukuran untuk menekan seseorang berkahwin.

input_text: Makcik kat ofis JPJ tu memang sengaja buat kerja lambat. Nampak sangat takde motivation nak tolong orang. Baik letak robot je ganti dia.
reason: Personally insulting a specific civil servant, suggesting she should be replaced by a robot. Rude and demeaning.
suggested_rewrite: Proses di JPJ agak lambat hari ini. Harap pihak pengurusan dapat memperbaiki kecekapan perkhidmatan.

input_text: Lelaki Melayu zaman sekarang banyak yang tak boleh harap. Kahwin je tau, tanggung jawab zero. Lepas tu salahkan isteri pulak.
reason: Negative ethnic and gender stereotype about Malay men as irresponsible husbands, broad generalisation.
suggested_rewrite: Ada sesetengah individu yang kurang bertanggungjawab dalam perkahwinan. Ini masalah individu, bukan kaum tertentu.

input_text: Jiran aku yang India tu tiap-tiap malam bakar kemenyan sampai bau masuk rumah aku. Tak reti nak consider jiran ke? Ingat rumah dia sorang je ke?
reason: Complaint about religious/cultural practice singling out Indian neighbour, dismissive tone about their practices.
suggested_rewrite: Bau kemenyan dari rumah jiran kadang-kadang masuk ke rumah saya. Mungkin saya boleh berbincang baik-baik dengan mereka tentang perkara ini.

input_text: Restaurant ni service macam sampah. Waiter buat muka masam, makanan sejam baru sampai. Bayar mahal tapi layanan macam kedai tepi jalan.
reason: Excessively rude review comparing service to 'sampah' (trash), insulting staff personally.
suggested_rewrite: Perkhidmatan restoran ini kurang memuaskan. Pesanan mengambil masa terlalu lama dan layanan boleh diperbaiki.

input_text: Taxi driver KL semua penipu. Meter tak nak on, harga sesuka hati. Lepas tu servis macam kau berhutang dengan dia. Memang patut Grab ambil alih.
reason: Blanket statement calling all KL taxi drivers cheats, rude and demeaning characterisation of an entire profession.
suggested_rewrite: Sesetengah pemandu teksi di KL tidak menggunakan meter dan mengenakan harga tinggi. Penguatkuasaan yang lebih baik diperlukan.

input_text: Sabah Sarawak orang semua cakap nak keluar Malaysia. Eh hello, without Peninsular punya subsidi korang ingat boleh survive ke? Jangan tak sedar diri.
reason: Dismissive and condescending remarks about East Malaysians, implying they cannot survive independently. Divisive.
suggested_rewrite: Hubungan antara Semenanjung dan Malaysia Timur perlu diperkukuh. Kedua-dua pihak menyumbang kepada pembangunan negara.

input_text: Dating app kat Malaysia ni, perempuan semua nak lelaki tinggi, kaya, handsome. Tapi diorang sendiri biasa-biasa je. Standard tak realistik langsung.
reason: Sexist generalisation about women on dating apps, dismissing their appearance while mocking their standards.
suggested_rewrite: Aplikasi dating boleh jadi mencabar kerana jangkaan yang berbeza. Penting untuk saling menghormati dalam proses mencari pasangan.

input_text: Ustaz kat TV tu cakap banyak pasal dosa orang lain tapi dengar cerita anak dia sendiri clubbing tiap minggu. Hipokrit tahap dewa.
reason: Spreading unverified gossip about a religious figure's family, calling them a hypocrite based on rumour.
suggested_rewrite: Tokoh agama juga manusia biasa. Kita tak patut menghukum mereka berdasarkan khabar angin tentang keluarga mereka.

input_text: Bangla workers duduk sebelah rumah aku ramai-ramai dalam satu unit. Bau busuk, bising, sampah merata. Memang tak boleh hidup dengan orang macam ni.
reason: Dehumanising complaints about Bangladeshi workers, sweeping negative characterisation. 'Tak boleh hidup' is exclusionary.
suggested_rewrite: Unit bersebelahan rumah saya dihuni ramai penghuni dan menimbulkan isu kebersihan serta kebisingan. Pihak pengurusan perlu menangani masalah ini.

input_text: Dah la parking masjid Jumaat overflow sampai jalan raya. Setiap minggu macam ni. Pihak masjid langsung tak ambil kisah pasal orang lain guna jalan.
reason: Complaint about mosque parking with accusatory tone towards mosque management, could inflame religious sensitivities.
suggested_rewrite: Parking masjid pada hari Jumaat sering melimpah ke jalan raya. Mungkin pihak masjid dan pihak berkuasa boleh bekerjasama mencari penyelesaian.

input_text: Dengar cerita menteri tu ada rumah kat London. Gaji menteri mana cukup beli rumah sana. Mesti ada side income 'special' ni. Korup habis.
reason: Unverified accusation of corruption against a minister based on rumour. 'Dengar cerita' framing admits it's hearsay.
suggested_rewrite: Ada dakwaan bahawa seorang menteri memiliki hartanah di luar negara. Perkara ini wajar disiasat oleh pihak berkuasa yang berkenaan.

input_text: Politician cakap nak tolong rakyat tapi anak dia pakai Lambo. Memang la, tolong rakyat masuk poket sendiri. Semua sama je politikus ni.
reason: Cynical generalisation of all politicians as corrupt based on unverified observation, emotionally charged.
suggested_rewrite: Ada perbezaan antara janji politik dan realiti. Kita perlu menuntut ketelusan dan akauntabiliti daripada wakil rakyat.

input_text: Pergi hospital kerajaan memang kena sabar. Doktor 5 minit, tunggu 5 jam. Staff semua muka tak happy macam kita yang salah datang.
reason: Broad insult to government hospital staff, characterising them all as unhappy and unwelcoming.
suggested_rewrite: Waktu menunggu di hospital kerajaan agak lama. Harap kerajaan dapat menambah kakitangan untuk perkhidmatan yang lebih baik.

input_text: Abang Grab Food tu hantar makanan lambat gila, sampai dah sejuk. Bayar delivery mahal-mahal dapat servis macam ni. Takde standard langsung.
reason: Rude complaint about delivery rider with no understanding of their working conditions. Demeaning tone.
suggested_rewrite: Penghantaran makanan kali ini agak lambat dan makanan sudah sejuk. Harap perkhidmatan dapat diperbaiki.

input_text: Pompuan pakai tudung labuh tapi mulut laser. Mengumpat orang 24/7. Baik bukak je tudung tu kalau perangai macam tu.
reason: Insulting a woman's character while mocking her religious attire choice. Linking hijab to expected behaviour is problematic.
suggested_rewrite: Mengumpat adalah sikap negatif yang perlu dielakkan oleh semua orang, tanpa mengira penampilan atau cara berpakaian.

input_text: Baru perasan jiran baru aku tu pasangan gay. Dua lelaki satu rumah, takde perempuan langsung. Aku OK je tapi risau la pengaruh kat anak-anak kampung.
reason: While claiming to be OK, expressing concern about gay neighbours 'influencing' children implies they are a negative influence.
suggested_rewrite: Jiran baru sudah berpindah masuk. Sebagai jiran, kita patut menghormati privasi dan hak semua orang.

input_text: Kawan aku cakap YB kawasan tu ada girlfriend muda. Isteri dia tak tahu. Kalau media tahu, habis la karier dia. Tapi biasa la politikus kan.
reason: Spreading personal gossip about a politician's alleged affair, based on hearsay from a friend. Unverified.
suggested_rewrite: Kehidupan peribadi ahli politik sepatutnya tidak diperkatakan tanpa bukti. Fokus kita perlu kepada prestasi mereka sebagai wakil rakyat.

input_text: Delivery rider potong queue kat traffic light macam biasa. Ingat motor kecik boleh buat sesuka hati ke? Satu hari nanti kena langgar baru tahu.
reason: Hostile towards delivery riders, implying they deserve to get hit by a car. Wishing harm, even mildly, is concerning.
suggested_rewrite: Penunggang motosikal yang memotong barisan di lampu isyarat membahayakan diri dan orang lain. Penguatkuasaan perlu diperketatkan.

input_text: Pekerja asing kat construction site sebelah rumah aku kuat sangat pasang lagu malam-malam. Takde adab langsung. Patut la orang tak suka.
reason: Characterising foreign workers as lacking manners ('takde adab'), suggesting it justifies people disliking them broadly.
suggested_rewrite: Pekerja di tapak binaan sebelah rumah memasang muzik kuat pada waktu malam. Saya akan membuat aduan kepada pihak pengurusan projek.

input_text: Tak paham kenapa kat Malaysia ni semua benda kena ada AP. Nak import barang pun susah. Cronies je yang untung, rakyat biasa kena tipu.
reason: Emotionally charged claim that AP system only benefits cronies, generalised accusation without nuance.
suggested_rewrite: Sistem AP di Malaysia perlu dikaji semula untuk memastikan ia memberi manfaat kepada rakyat dan bukan hanya pihak tertentu.

input_text: Aku dengar cerita company tu nak buang semua pekerja Melayu dan ganti dengan orang luar. Confirm ada agenda ni. Share-share la supaya orang tahu.
reason: Spreading unverified rumour about ethnic employment discrimination, urging others to share which could cause panic.
suggested_rewrite: Terdapat kebimbangan mengenai dasar pengambilan pekerja di sesetengah syarikat. Perkara ini perlu disahkan sebelum disebarkan.

input_text: Semua pemandu Myvi memang bawak macam raja jalan. Potong kiri kanan, signal tak pasang. Dah la kereta murah, perangai pun cheap.
reason: Insulting Myvi drivers and linking car price to character ('cheap car, cheap behaviour'). Classist and rude.
suggested_rewrite: Ada pemandu yang memandu dengan agresif tanpa mengira jenis kenderaan. Keselamatan jalan raya adalah tanggungjawab semua.

input_text: Apasal kedai runcit India ni semua overcharge? Harga kat tag lain, kena cas lain. Dah la expiry date pun tak check. Memang style diorang la.
reason: Ethnic generalisation accusing all Indian-run provision shops of overcharging, 'memang style diorang' implies it's a racial trait.
suggested_rewrite: Sesetengah kedai runcit tidak memaparkan harga yang tepat. Pengguna boleh membuat aduan kepada KPDNHEP untuk penguatkuasaan.

input_text: Aku pelik kenapa orang Cina ni semua kedekut. Makan sama-sama tapi nak split bill sampai sen. Kawan pun nak kira. Memang darah diorang macam tu kot.
reason: Ethnic stereotype calling Chinese people stingy, attributing behaviour to ethnicity ('darah diorang'). Derogatory generalisation.
suggested_rewrite: Cara membahagi bil makan berbeza mengikut individu dan budaya. Tidak ada cara yang betul atau salah, yang penting saling menghormati.

input_text: Orang kampung punya mentality memang lain. Apa-apa pun salahkan kerajaan tapi sendiri tak nak usaha. Malas tapi nak hidup senang.
reason: Dismissive urban-rural prejudice, calling rural people lazy and having a lesser mentality. Classist and rude.
suggested_rewrite: Masyarakat luar bandar menghadapi cabaran tersendiri. Sokongan kerajaan dan inisiatif komuniti perlu seiring untuk meningkatkan taraf hidup.

input_text: Makcik WhatsApp group forward fake news pasal kesihatan tiap hari. Bawang boleh cure cancer la, air suam detox la. Dah la bodoh, nak ajak orang lain bodoh sekali.
reason: Calling older women in WhatsApp groups stupid ('bodoh') for sharing health misinformation. Rude personal attack.
suggested_rewrite: Ada ahli kumpulan WhatsApp yang kerap berkongsi maklumat kesihatan yang tidak sahih. Kita perlu galakkan semakan fakta sebelum menyebarkan maklumat.

input_text: JPJ officer tu memang nak duit kopi je. Tahan kereta sikit-sikit pun nak saman. Kalau bagi RM50 terus lepas. Semua orang tau dah.
reason: Accusing all JPJ officers of bribery based on generalised claim. 'Semua orang tau' is unsubstantiated.
suggested_rewrite: Terdapat dakwaan rasuah dalam kalangan pegawai penguatkuasa. Jika ada bukti, laporan perlu dibuat kepada SPRM.

input_text: Aku tak faham kenapa orang still nak kahwin awal. Umur 22 dah nak jadi mak. Lepas tu mengeluh hidup susah. Duh, siapa suruh?
reason: Judgmental and dismissive about young parents, mocking their life choices with 'siapa suruh' (who asked you to).
suggested_rewrite: Keputusan untuk berkahwin dan berkeluarga adalah hak peribadi. Yang penting ada persediaan dari segi kewangan dan emosi.

input_text: Dengar kata menteri pendidikan tu beli ijazah palsu. Patut la dasar pendidikan makin teruk. Rakyat yang tanggung akibatnya.
reason: Spreading unverified rumour about education minister having a fake degree, linking it to policy criticism without evidence.
suggested_rewrite: Terdapat dakwaan mengenai kelayakan akademik menteri pendidikan. Jika benar, pihak berkuasa perlu menyiasat. Dasar pendidikan perlu dinilai secara objektif.

input_text: Menteri tu cakap nak turunkan harga rumah tapi anak dia beli condo RM2 juta. Cakap tak serupa bikin. Semua ahli politik sama je, penipu belaka.
reason: Using unverified claim about minister's child to brand all politicians as liars. Emotionally charged generalisation.
suggested_rewrite: Isu mampu milik perumahan memerlukan tindakan konkrit dari kerajaan. Ketelusan dalam harta ahli politik juga penting untuk kepercayaan rakyat.

input_text: Every time go government office sure got one aunty there who act like she doing YOU a favour. Excuse me, it's YOUR JOB la dey.
reason: Rude personal insult directed at civil servants with dismissive tone, though expressing legitimate frustration.
suggested_rewrite: Service at government offices can be slow and the experience frustrating. I wish the process was more efficient.

input_text: Younger generation thinks changing job every year is normal. No loyalty, no patience. Then complain no one wants to hire them. Padan muka.
reason: Dismissive generalisation of younger workers, using 'padan muka' (serves them right) in a mocking tone.
suggested_rewrite: Job-hopping is more common now. Both employers and employees could benefit from understanding each other's expectations better.

input_text: My Indian colleague always come late to meeting but when boss ask, sure got excuse ready. Very talented in that area la I tell you.
reason: Singling out a colleague by ethnicity for a workplace complaint, implying the behaviour is linked to being Indian.
suggested_rewrite: A colleague of mine is frequently late to meetings. It affects team productivity and should be addressed by management.

input_text: Colleague from China always talk so loud in office. I know la your culture like that but can you respect others or not? This is Malaysia bro.
reason: Stereotyping someone from China as loud due to their culture, dismissive and othering tone.
suggested_rewrite: My colleague tends to speak quite loudly in the office. I should find a polite way to discuss office noise levels.

input_text: My boss literally asked me to come in on Deepavali because 'it's not a big deal'. But CNY and Raya all can take leave. Discrimination much?
reason: While the frustration is valid, framing it as discrimination without full context is emotionally charged and could inflame communal tensions.
suggested_rewrite: I was asked to work on Deepavali which felt unfair. All public holidays should be respected equally by employers.

input_text: My Malay housemate never cleans the common area. Always leave dishes in the sink for days. These people same la, at home got maid do everything for them.
reason: Attributing messiness to ethnicity with 'these people', implying it's a Malay trait. Ethnic generalisation.
suggested_rewrite: My housemate doesn't clean the common area regularly. We need to have a house meeting to set cleaning expectations.

input_text: Tamil movies fans are so dramatic. Everything also cry cry cry. No wonder la their drama in real life also same level. Overreact king.
reason: Mocking Tamil cinema fans and by extension Tamil people as dramatic, linking movie preferences to ethnic character.
suggested_rewrite: Different film industries have their own styles. Tamil cinema has a rich storytelling tradition that resonates with many viewers.

input_text: Women drivers la, always signal left then turn right. No spatial awareness at all. That's why insurance for women should be higher.
reason: Sexist generalisation about women drivers, suggesting discriminatory insurance pricing based on gender.
suggested_rewrite: Some drivers make confusing signals on the road. Driving skills vary among individuals regardless of gender.

input_text: I swear Penang drivers are the WORST in Malaysia. No signal, cut queue, horn non-stop. The whole island needs to retake driving test.
reason: Hostile generalisation of all Penang drivers, suggesting they should retake driving tests. Regional prejudice.
suggested_rewrite: Traffic behaviour in Penang can be challenging. Better road design and enforcement could improve the driving experience.

input_text: Why Chinese wedding dinner always start 2 hours late one? Invitation say 7pm, food come 9pm. Respect people's time la.
reason: Ethnic-specific complaint about Chinese weddings, framing a cultural norm negatively. Rude tone.
suggested_rewrite: Wedding dinners that start much later than stated can be frustrating for guests. Clearer communication about timing would be appreciated.

input_text: This new colleague always speak Mandarin in meetings even though got Malay and Indian people. So rude la. They think only Chinese matter is it?
reason: While the concern about inclusivity is valid, 'they think only Chinese matter' escalates to an ethnic accusation.
suggested_rewrite: Using a common language in mixed meetings is important for inclusivity. Perhaps a gentle reminder about the meeting language policy would help.

input_text: Malaysian Chinese think they are superior because they speak Mandarin. News flash: speaking 3 languages doesn't make you better than everyone else.
reason: Attributing a superiority complex to all Malaysian Chinese, dismissive of multilingualism. Ethnic generalisation.
suggested_rewrite: Malaysia's multilingual society is an asset. No one should feel superior or inferior based on the languages they speak.

input_text: Local university graduates cannot even write proper English email. Then want to compete with Singapore graduates. Dream on la.
reason: Dismissive insult to all local graduates, unfavourable comparison with Singapore. Demoralising and overgeneralised.
suggested_rewrite: English proficiency among some local graduates could be improved. Universities should focus on strengthening communication skills in their curriculum.

input_text: Government hospital doctors all rushing through consultation. 2 minutes per patient then next. Might as well see a robot, at least robot won't rush you.
reason: Comparing doctors to robots, dismissing their work under difficult conditions. Insulting and ungrateful tone.
suggested_rewrite: Government hospital consultations feel very brief due to high patient volume. More medical staff would improve the quality of patient care.

input_text: Neighbor's dog bark whole night nobody say anything. But when Muslim want to azan, everyone complain noise. Hypocrites everywhere in this country.
reason: Pitting noise complaints against each other along religious lines, calling people hypocrites. Provocative framing.
suggested_rewrite: Noise complaints should be handled consistently regardless of the source. Community dialogue can help find solutions that respect everyone.

input_text: Why do Indian guys always rev their motorcycle so loud? Whole neighborhood can hear. Compensation for something is it? So inconsiderate.
reason: Ethnic targeting of Indian men for motorcycle noise with innuendo ('compensation for something'), crude and stereotyping.
suggested_rewrite: Loud motorcycle exhaust noise at night disturbs the neighbourhood. Noise regulations should be enforced regardless of who the rider is.

input_text: Why Malaysian men think buying dinner means the girl owes them something? So transactional. No wonder la single forever, mentality stuck in the 80s.
reason: Hostile generalisation of all Malaysian men as transactional in dating, insulting them as stuck in the past.
suggested_rewrite: Expectations around dating can vary. Healthy relationships are built on mutual respect, not transactional thinking.

input_text: I think Grab drivers purposely take long route so the fare go up. All same tactic one. Don't think passengers are stupid la bro.
reason: Accusing all Grab drivers of cheating passengers, unsubstantiated blanket accusation against an entire group.
suggested_rewrite: Sometimes ride-hailing routes seem longer than expected. Passengers can report route discrepancies through the app for review.

input_text: Chinese aunties at the market bargain until the seller lose money also they don't care. So kiasu one, everything also want cheapest. No empathy.
reason: Ethnic stereotype of Chinese aunties as kiasu and lacking empathy, negative generalisation based on ethnicity.
suggested_rewrite: Aggressive bargaining at markets can be frustrating for sellers. Fair pricing benefits both buyers and sellers.

input_text: Indian guys on dating apps always lie about their height. Profile say 175cm but in real life barely 165cm. Why la always have to exaggerate.
reason: Ethnic-specific accusation of dishonesty on dating apps, stereotyping Indian men as liars about physical attributes.
suggested_rewrite: Some dating app users exaggerate their profiles. Honesty makes for better connections regardless of background.

input_text: Every time raya, Malay neighbour invite us for open house then serve all the food we cannot eat. Then wonder why we don't come. Clueless la.
reason: Calling Malay neighbours 'clueless' about dietary needs, dismissive tone about their hospitality efforts.
suggested_rewrite: It would be great if open house hosts could provide a variety of food options for guests with different dietary needs. Communication helps.

input_text: 这些马来档口的食物永远都是那样，味道普普通通，不知道为什么还有人排队。
reason: Dismissive generalisation of Malay food stalls with ethnic undertone, implying inferiority of an entire community's cuisine.
suggested_rewrite: 这家档口的食物不太合我口味，不过每个人喜好不同。

input_text: 每次去政府部门办事，那些人做工像乌龟一样慢。纳税人的钱都浪费了。
reason: Comparing civil servants to turtles (slow), rude characterisation of government workers as a whole.
suggested_rewrite: 政府部门的办事效率有待提高，希望能简化流程以更好地服务民众。

input_text: 华人女生不要嫁马来人啦，文化不同很难相处的。到时后悔就来不及了。
reason: Discouraging interethnic marriage based on stereotyped cultural incompatibility, promotes communal division.
suggested_rewrite: 跨文化婚姻确实需要更多沟通和理解，但只要双方愿意努力，都可以幸福。

input_text: 这些年轻人整天就知道刷手机，叫他们做点事就说压力大。我们那个年代哪有这样？太娇生惯养了。
reason: Dismissive generalisation about young people as pampered and lazy, invalidating mental health concerns.
suggested_rewrite: 年轻人面对的压力和挑战与上一代不同。我们应该多了解和支持他们。

input_text: 那些印度档口的食物看起来脏脏的，我不敢吃。不是我种族歧视啊，但是真的不卫生。
reason: Claiming Indian food stalls are dirty while disclaiming racism - the disclaimer itself highlights the ethnic targeting.
suggested_rewrite: 食物卫生是所有餐饮业者应注意的事项。我比较注重食物的清洁程度。

input_text: 这个马来同事每天准时五点就走了，从来不加班。我们华人还在拼命做工，公平吗？
reason: Ethnic comparison implying Malay colleagues are lazy vs hardworking Chinese, reinforcing divisive stereotypes.
suggested_rewrite: 工作时间和效率因人而异。重要的是完成工作质量，而不是比较谁留得更晚。

input_text: 印度人的婚礼真的很吵，搞到整条街都不能睡觉。他们就不能小声一点吗？
reason: Complaining about Indian weddings being noisy, singling out an ethnic group's cultural celebrations negatively.
suggested_rewrite: 邻居的婚礼庆祝活动声音比较大，影响了周围居民的休息。希望能控制音量和时间。

input_text: 为什么马来西亚的客服态度都这么差？打电话等半天，接了还一脸不耐烦。服务业不适合你就别做啦。
reason: Blanket insult to all Malaysian customer service workers, telling them to quit if they can't do their job.
suggested_rewrite: 马来西亚的客服等待时间有时较长，服务态度也有改善空间。希望企业能加强培训。

input_text: 马来人做生意真的不行，开的店三个月就关了。不是我说，做生意需要勤劳的。
reason: Ethnic stereotype implying Malays are lazy and cannot run businesses, generalising individual failure to entire community.
suggested_rewrite: 创业不容易，很多因素影响生意成败。每个人都有潜力成功，关键在于支持和策略。

input_text: 有些马来人真的很懒，政府给了那么多扶持还是不行。Bumiputra政策养出来的就是这样。
reason: Calling Malays lazy and blaming bumiputra policies for creating dependency. Deeply stereotypical ethnic generalisation.
suggested_rewrite: 扶持政策的效果值得讨论，但不应将个别情况归咎于整个族群。政策评估应基于数据而非偏见。

input_text: 华人过年放鞭炮吵死了，半夜三更还在放。这里又不是中国，尊重一下邻居好不好？
reason: 'This is not China' comment is dismissive of Chinese Malaysian cultural practices, othering a local community.
suggested_rewrite: 农历新年期间深夜的烟花鞭炮声影响邻居休息。希望庆祝活动能在合理时间内进行。

input_text: 那个Dato的女儿开着法拉利去大学。普通人家的孩子骑摩托都不够钱。这就是马来西亚的贫富差距。
reason: Emotionally charged wealth inequality commentary using unverified anecdote about a Dato's daughter to inflame class resentment.
suggested_rewrite: 马来西亚的贫富差距是需要关注的社会议题。政策应确保教育和发展机会更加公平。

input_text: 每次去银行都要等很久。那些柜台的人做工慢到像蜗牛，玩手机比服务客户更重要。
reason: Comparing bank tellers to snails and accusing them of playing with phones, rude characterisation.
suggested_rewrite: 银行柜台的等待时间较长，希望银行能增加服务窗口或推广网上银行来提高效率。

input_text: 为什么马来西亚的公共厕所永远都是脏的？东南亚最脏的厕所就在这里了。没有一个人有公德心。
reason: Sweeping insult claiming Malaysia has the dirtiest toilets in Southeast Asia and no one has civic consciousness.
suggested_rewrite: 马来西亚公共厕所的清洁水平有待提高。定期清洁和使用者的自律都很重要。

input_text: இந்த ஊபர் டிரைவர் ரோட் தெரியாம ஓட்டுறான். GPS பாக்காம எப்படி லைசன்ஸ் வாங்கினான் இவன்?
reason: Rude personal insult questioning a driver's competence and licence validity. Demeaning tone.
suggested_rewrite: இந்த ஊபர் டிரைவருக்கு வழி சரியாக தெரியவில்லை. GPS பயன்படுத்தினால் நல்லது.

input_text: இந்த ஏரியாவில் பங்களாதேஷ் ஆள் நிறைய வந்துட்டாங்க. இப்போ எங்க போனாலும் அவங்கதான். கொஞ்சம் பயமா இருக்கு.
reason: Expressing fear about presence of Bangladeshi workers in an area, implying they are a threat without basis.
suggested_rewrite: இந்த ஏரியாவில் வெளிநாட்டு தொழிலாளர்கள் அதிகமாக இருக்கிறார்கள். சரியான ஆவணங்கள் இருக்கிறதா என்று அதிகாரிகள் பார்க்க வேண்டும்.

input_text: இந்த ஏரியா temple festival நடக்கும்போது சத்தம் தாங்க முடியல. ராத்திரி 12 மணிக்கும் music அடிக்குறாங்க. யாருக்கும் கவலை இல்ல.
reason: Complaint about temple festival noise that could inflame religious tensions, dismissive tone about organisers.
suggested_rewrite: கோயில் திருவிழா நேரத்தில் இரவு நேர இசை சத்தமாக இருக்கிறது. நேரக் கட்டுப்பாடுகள் இருந்தால் அனைவருக்கும் நல்லது.

input_text: எங்க ஊர்ல சைனா காரங்க எல்லா shop-ம் ஆக்கிரமிச்சிட்டாங்க. நம்ம ஆளுங்களுக்கு chance-ே இல்ல.
reason: Framing Chinese business presence as 'occupation' that excludes Tamil community, us-vs-them narrative.
suggested_rewrite: வணிக வாய்ப்புகள் அனைத்து சமூகத்தினருக்கும் சமமாக கிடைக்க வேண்டும். அரசாங்க திட்டங்கள் இதற்கு உதவலாம்.

input_text: இந்த office-ல மலாய் பசங்க lunch 2 மணி நேரம் போறாங்க, நாம 30 நிமிஷம் தான். யாரும் ஒன்னும் சொல்ல மாட்டாங்க.
reason: Ethnically framed workplace complaint implying Malay colleagues get preferential treatment, fostering resentment.
suggested_rewrite: அலுவலகத்தில் மதிய உணவு நேரம் குறித்த விதிகள் அனைவருக்கும் சமமாக இருக்க வேண்டும்.

input_text: இந்த millennial பசங்க job interview-க்கு கூட casual-ா வருவாங்க. நம்ம காலத்தில tie போடுவோம். இவங்களுக்கு respect-ே தெரியாது.
reason: Dismissive generalisation of millennials as disrespectful based on dress code, rigid age-based judgment.
suggested_rewrite: தொழில்முறை உடை குறித்த எதிர்பார்ப்புகள் காலத்திற்கேற்ப மாறுகின்றன. முக்கியம் திறமையும் அர்ப்பணிப்பும் தான்.

input_text: இந்த dating app-ல பொண்ணுங்க எல்லாம் 6 feet above மட்டும் தான் வேணும்னு சொல்றாங்க. நீங்க என்ன supermodel-ஆ? கொஞ்சம் realistic-ஆ இருங்க.
reason: Mocking women's dating preferences and insulting their appearance, dismissive and sexist tone.
suggested_rewrite: Dating app-ல் எதிர்பார்ப்புகள் வேறுபடலாம். பரஸ்பர மரியாதையுடன் தொடர்பு கொள்வது முக்கியம்.

input_text: இந்த area-ல Muslim பக்கத்துல இருக்கிற கடைல non-halal சாப்பாடு வாங்க கூட முடியாது. எல்லாமே halal-ஆ இருக்கணும்னு யார் சொன்னா?
reason: Resentful tone about halal food prevalence, framing it as Muslim imposition on non-Muslims. Could inflame religious tensions.
suggested_rewrite: இந்த ஏரியாவில் halal இல்லாத உணவுக்கடைகள் குறைவாக உள்ளன. அனைத்து சமூகத்தினரின் உணவுத் தேவைகளையும் பூர்த்தி செய்யும் கடைகள் இருந்தால் நல்லது.

input_text: இவங்க எல்லாம் TikTok-ல dance போட்டுட்டு famous ஆகணும்னு நினைக்குறாங்க. படிப்பு இல்ல, talent இல்ல. இந்த generation waste.
reason: Calling an entire generation 'waste' for using TikTok, dismissing their education and talent. Harsh generalisation.
suggested_rewrite: சமூக ஊடகங்களில் படைப்பாற்றல் இருக்கிறது, ஆனால் கல்வியும் முக்கியம். இரண்டையும் சமநிலையில் வைத்திருப்பது நல்லது.

input_text: இந்த boomer uncle WhatsApp group-ல fake news share பண்ணுறாங்க daily. எதையும் verify பண்ணாம forward அடிக்குறாங்க. இவங்க தான் problem.
reason: Blaming older generation entirely for fake news spread, calling them 'the problem'. Ageist and dismissive.
suggested_rewrite: WhatsApp குழுக்களில் சரிபார்க்கப்படாத செய்திகள் பகிரப்படுவது கவலையளிக்கிறது. அனைத்து வயதினரும் தகவல்களை சரிபார்க்க பழக வேண்டும்.

input_text: I heard ah, that Datuk from Johor actually kena tangkap before for money laundering but kabel strong so case hilang. Don't know true or not la but where got smoke no fire right?
reason: Spreading unverified rumor about a public figure with no evidence. 'Where got smoke no fire' framing presents rumor as likely true.
suggested_rewrite: There have been unverified claims about a Datuk from Johor. Without confirmed reports, it's best not to spread speculation.

input_text: Boomers in my office always want to CC the whole world in email. Bro it's 2026, learn to use Slack la. So dinosaur one these people.
reason: Dismissive insult towards older colleagues ('dinosaur'), mocking their work habits based on age.
suggested_rewrite: Some colleagues prefer email over newer tools. It might help if the office provided training on modern communication platforms.

input_text: Aiyoo Tamil school parents ah, double park like the road is their father's property. Every morning same story, block the whole jalan.
reason: Complaint about parking singling out Tamil school parents specifically, adding ethnic dimension to a traffic issue.
suggested_rewrite: Double parking near schools every morning causes traffic jams. Better enforcement or drop-off zones would help everyone.

input_text: Cina punya kedai memang la murah sikit but you think they give you good stuff ah? Semua potong corner one la.
reason: Ethnic stereotype about Chinese businesses cutting corners, generalising dishonesty to an entire community.
suggested_rewrite: Some shops offer lower prices but the quality may vary. It's worth checking reviews regardless of who runs the business.

input_text: Melayu complain pasal kuil Hindu bising, tapi masjid subuh pukul 5 pagi takde masalah pulak. Double standard much?
reason: Pitting religious communities against each other with 'double standard' framing, provocative inter-religious comparison.
suggested_rewrite: Noise from any place of worship can affect neighbours. A respectful community discussion about reasonable sound levels benefits everyone.

input_text: Old people on the road should just surrender their licence already. Driving 40km/h on the highway, causing jam for everyone. Bahaya tau tak.
reason: Age-based discrimination calling for elderly drivers to lose licences, dismissive and demeaning generalisation.
suggested_rewrite: Some drivers go very slowly on the highway which can be dangerous. Perhaps regular driving assessments for all drivers would improve road safety.

input_text: Mamak restaurant staff always so rude one. You ask for extra tissue also they give you that look. Bro, I'm paying customer la.
reason: Generalising all mamak restaurant staff as rude, with potential ethnic undertone since 'mamak' has ethnic connotations.
suggested_rewrite: The service at some restaurants could be more friendly. As a customer, I hope for better hospitality.

input_text: Motorcyclist in Malaysia think they own the road. Lane splitting, run red light, then when accident happen blame the car. Bodoh betul.
reason: Hostile generalisation of all motorcyclists as reckless and stupid ('bodoh betul'), inflammatory tone.
suggested_rewrite: Some motorcyclists take dangerous risks on the road. Better enforcement of traffic laws would improve safety for everyone.

input_text: Heard the new CEO got the job because of connections only. Qualification-wise not up to mark one. Typical la, in Malaysia semua pakai cable.
reason: Spreading unverified rumour about a CEO's qualifications, cynically generalising about Malaysian meritocracy.
suggested_rewrite: There are concerns about whether the new CEO's appointment was merit-based. Transparent hiring practices would build confidence.

input_text: Those people from East Malaysia come to KL and act blur about everything. ATM also don't know how to use. Kampung sangat la diorang ni.
reason: Demeaning East Malaysians as 'kampung' (backward), mocking them for being unfamiliar with urban facilities.
suggested_rewrite: People from different parts of Malaysia may take time to adjust to city life. We should be helpful rather than judgmental.

input_text: Myvi drivers are the worst la. Drive like they own a sports car. One day confirm masuk longkang. Deserve it also.
reason: Hostile generalisation of Myvi drivers, wishing misfortune on them ('deserve it'). Mean-spirited.
suggested_rewrite: Some drivers of smaller cars drive aggressively. All drivers should be mindful of road safety regardless of vehicle type.

input_text: This kopitiam uncle charge me RM8 for kopi. Robbery in broad daylight. See my face tourist is it? Typical la, see can cheat then cheat.
reason: Accusing kopitiam owner of being a cheat, hostile language ('robbery'), overly aggressive response to pricing.
suggested_rewrite: The coffee price at this kopitiam seemed unusually high. Clear pricing displayed on the menu would help avoid misunderstandings.

input_text: Tinder kat Malaysia ni full of catfish. Girls pakai gambar 10 tahun lepas, jumpa lain macam. At least be honest la, waste my time only.
reason: Dismissive generalisation about women on Tinder as catfish, rude and demeaning characterisation.
suggested_rewrite: Online dating profiles don't always match reality. Honesty in profiles would make the experience better for everyone.

input_text: Mak aku cakap jangan kahwin orang lain bangsa nanti susah. Honestly I agree la, mixed marriages always got problem one. Better stick to your own kind.
reason: Advocating against interethnic marriage and endorsing 'stick to your own kind' mentality. Divisive.
suggested_rewrite: Interethnic marriages have unique challenges but also bring richness. Success depends on mutual understanding, not ethnic background.

input_text: KL drivers honk for EVERYTHING. Green light 0.5 second - HONK. Want to change lane - HONK. Breathing - HONK. Y'all need anger management seriously.
reason: Hostile generalisation of all KL drivers, telling them they need anger management. Sarcastic and rude tone.
suggested_rewrite: Excessive honking is a common issue in KL traffic. A more patient driving culture would benefit everyone on the road.

input_text: Malaysian men on dating apps: first message already ask for photo without hijab. Pervert ke apa? Takde adab langsung lelaki sekarang.
reason: Generalising all Malaysian men on dating apps as perverts, hostile characterisation based on individual bad behaviour.
suggested_rewrite: Some users on dating apps send inappropriate messages. Platforms should enforce better moderation and users should practice respectful communication.

input_text: Parking attendant at the mall was so rude to me just because I asked for directions. These people act like they own the place. Zero customer service skills.
reason: Rude generalisation about parking attendants, 'these people' is dismissive and demeaning towards service workers.
suggested_rewrite: The parking attendant at the mall wasn't very helpful when I asked for directions. Better training would improve the customer experience.

input_text: Malaysian parents still think doctor, lawyer, engineer are the only real jobs. Your son is a content creator? Oh sorry, so he's unemployed la.
reason: Mocking and dismissive of both parents and content creators, sarcastic generalisation of Malaysian attitudes.
suggested_rewrite: Career paths have diversified significantly. Content creation is a legitimate profession, and parents may need time to understand new industries.

input_text: Civil servants in Malaysia got the best deal. Work 9 to 5, never OT, pension guaranteed. Private sector people suffering while they chill. No wonder service so bad.
reason: Hostile generalisation of all civil servants as lazy and chilling while others suffer, unfair professional defamation.
suggested_rewrite: There are differences between public and private sector working conditions. Both sectors face their own challenges and contribute to the country.

input_text: Orang Melayu selalu cakap 'rezeki ada mana-mana' tapi effort tak nak letak. Lepas tu salahkan nasib. Bukan nasib bro, malas tu yang jadi masalah.
reason: Ethnic stereotype calling Malays lazy and fatalistic, attributing individual laziness to the entire community.
suggested_rewrite: Setiap orang perlu berusaha untuk mencapai kejayaan. Rezeki memang perlu dicari dengan usaha yang konsisten.

input_text: 这些Grab司机英文都不会说，路也不认识。我叫他去KLCC他去KL Sentral。真的是浪费我的时间和钱。
reason: Rude complaint about Grab driver's language skills and navigation, demeaning tone about their competence.
suggested_rewrite: 这次Grab行程司机走错路了。使用GPS导航和app内沟通功能可以减少此类问题。
